data.name: EmyLiveShow: King of Desires
data.detailed_description:
EmyLiveShow: King of Desires is an erotic puzzle game featuring fully voiced story cutscenes, where you’ll take part in a provocative tournament among popular V-Tubers.

The player must complete a series of puzzle challenges to unlock explicit scenes with four heroines: Emy, Nia, Uma, and Six. Each victory in a mini-game opens up a new animated and fully voiced story segment, advancing the tournament's narrative.

- Club Entertainment – Face off against the girls in a flashy nightclub, where they’ll greet you in their signature and casual outfits!

- Palace Round – At an elegant royal reception, make the girls take off their long ballroom dresses just for you!

- Final Round in the Dungeon – Secure your victory and enjoy the girls in fetish outfits and situations!

Game Features:

  • Puzzle Gameplay – Classic jigsaw-style gameplay where difficulty increases as you progress through the game.

  • Voiced Scenes – Every story sequence is accompanied by professional voice acting for each heroine.

  • Four Unique Opponents – Each girl has her own look, personality, and style of behavior.

  • Story-Driven Tournament – Advance from club to palace and dungeon, winning rounds and earning the right to make your desires come true.

  • Diverse Outfits and Looks – From casual wear to elegant gowns and fetish gear.

This game is perfect for those looking to combine relaxing puzzle gameplay with an engaging storyline and erotic content.

Win the tournament and become the true King of Desires!

data.short_description: Take on the girls, beat them at their own game, and score the chance to have your steamy wishes granted.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 64 Bit Windows 7, 8, 10 or 11
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Intel® Core™ i5-750 or 3.2 GHz AMD Phenom™ II X4 955
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
